TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Bunun, story: bnNr-pear_Talum

S.FORM: adii madaingaz tama hai kitngaab saia matapul lapat.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人，他開始採番石榴。
That old man over there, he begins to pluck guavas.

S.FORM: pisialun saicia kankan sia kalala at.
S.TRANSL: 他把他們好好整理在籃子裡面。
He arranges them correctly in the basket.

S.FORM: saduan saicia tu mais masial hai mais makuang haishaisun malanglang.
S.TRANSL: 他看到哪些是好的，哪些是不好的，擦乾淨（果子）。
He sees if they are good or bad and wipes them clean.

S.FORM: at muhna ang a saia kudadaza at matapul at aiza tu tacini bunun lahaib maskus mai sia sidi a patankakaun asia sidi.
S.TRANSL: 接著，他又上去，然後有一個人牽著山羊經過，他讓山羊吃草。
Then, he goes up and harvests again. Then there is a person passing by with a goat, which he let graze.

S.FORM: maz a madaingaz a hai nii saia islunghu.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人，他不休息。
That old man, he does not rest.

S.FORM: matatapul masisivit tu mais mahtu tapulun hai sizaun at.
S.TRANSL: 他在一邊採果子一邊觀察果子是否可以被採。
He’s plucking and observing if they can be plucked and taken.

S.FORM: aiza uvaaz tasa uvaaz lahaib tuntatanpu.
S.TRANSL: 有一個孩子騎單車。
There is a child riding his bike.

S.FORM: nadadu saia mapahahainan hai.
S.TRANSL: 說不定他要過去玩。
Maybe he’s going over there to play.

S.FORM: islunghu saia sadu tu at supah a cinapul lapat an at.
S.TRANSL: 他在休息，看到很多被採摘的番石榴。
He’s resting and sees that there are many guavas that have been plucked.

S.FORM: samangha saia sadu tu maz a madaingaz a hai adadaza ang matapul.
S.TRANSL: 他抬起頭看到老人還在採。
He looks upward and sees that the old man is still there plucking (fruit).

S.FORM: at ana siza saia tu tasa hai miliskin saia tu langaci nii ang madaingaz a masivit at.
S.TRANSL: 他想拿一個也沒關係，反正老人也沒在看。
If he takes one, he thinks that’s okay. The old man isn’t looking anyway.

S.FORM: ansahanun saicia tas tu kalala a antaban.
S.TRANSL: 他搬走一個籃子。
He takes one basket away.

S.FORM: tanghaiuun saicia tas tu kalala a madas mudaan.
S.TRANSL: 他把一籃子全部偷走。
He takes a basket away.

S.FORM: at maz a madaingaz a hai nii saia haiap saia ka malala’la matatapul.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人不知道，所以沒有大喊地一直在採果實。
The old man is unaware so he doesn’t yell and keeps plucking.

S.FORM: sadu saia tu aiza tasa amin a binanauaz tuntampu hai cinhuza saia kalinkusbai un tamuung an nii tu sadu hai paptuh a tauntaun a sia tampu asia batu at mucingkul.
S.TRANSL: 他看到有一個女生騎過來，她的帽子被風吹掉。他看呆了，沒注意到他輪子碰到石頭，讓他跌掉。
He’s shocked because he sees a girl also biking over, whose hat has been blown off by the wind, and he doesn’t see his tire hitting a stone, as he falls on the ground.

S.FORM: pantutu maz a sia siniza saicia maz a lapat at.
S.TRANSL: 他所拿的番石榴也都倒出來了。
The guavas he took spill out.

S.FORM: saduan saicia bantas tu pan’uni madahpa.
S.TRANSL: 他看到腳有沒有受傷。
He looks if his foot didn’t get hurt.

S.FORM: aiza dii tatau uvaaz minduduaz a uvaaz sia daan cia mapahahainan at sadu tu mucingkul saia.
S.TRANSL: 有三個年輕人在路上玩耍，看到他跌倒。
There are three young people playing who see him falling over.

S.FORM: indangazan naicia saia kankan.
S.TRANSL: 他們去幫忙他裝籃子。
They help him fill the basket.

S.FORM: kanahtungan naicia kankan mindia ansahanun naicia.
S.TRANSL: 裝好後，他們幫他搬起來。
After collecting, they help him put up the basket.

S.FORM: ung at tasa uvaaz hai inkadua s isaicia tamuung kalinkusbaiun pis‘uluk in saicia mala’la at masatu masaiv.
S.TRANSL: 一個小孩子見到他被吹掉的帽子，呼嘯叫過來，送過去給他。
One child sees the hat that was blown off, and whistles over, to give him the hat.

S.FORM: sia adii uvaaz a siniza mas lapat a hai masaiv naitan tu tacini hai satatasa kaupa tu kaunun naicia.
S.TRANSL: 這個拿番石榴的孩子給他們三個一人一個來吃
This kid that took the guavas gives them one each to eat.

S.FORM: maupacia naia mudadaan maunmaunmaun kulumah.
S.TRANSL: 這樣子他們邊走邊吃回家。
This way, they go home while eating.

S.FORM: madaingaz a hai kanahtung in saia matapul at kunastu in.
S.TRANSL: 老人收完了，就下來了。
The old man is done harvesting, and goes down.

S.FORM: masivit tu ‘ia tu ana tau tu kalala ‘ia tu isuka tasa kalala.
S.TRANSL: 他看，原來的三個籃子怎麼會少了一個？
He sees, originally there were three baskets, but one is missing?
